Visit.title: Visit
Visit.description: A record of a library visitor entry.

uid.description: The unique ID of the visitor.

name.description: The display name of the visitor.

email.description: The institutional email of the visitor.

program.description: The academic program of the visitor.

timeIn.description: The timestamp when the visitor checked in.

BlockedUser.title: BlockedUser
BlockedUser.description: A record of a blocked user.

uid.description: The unique ID of the blocked user.

email.description: The email of the blocked user.

blockedAt.description: The timestamp when the user was blocked.

blockedUsers.description: Collection of users who are blocked from using the library.
